use_cases: Displaying digital wallet balance and payment methods in fintech applications
Showing credit/debit card information in e-commerce checkout flows
Presenting account summary cards in banking dashboards
Rendering stored payment methods in subscription management interfaces
ai_summary: A wallet card component for displaying payment card information, balances, and financial account details. Part of a collection of premium UI components designed for fintech and e-commerce platforms, featuring modern card styling suitable for digital payment interfaces and account summary displays.
